title: Jungle Chef
description: The time has come to bring together the best of the best in jungle cuisine. Who will win the battle and become King of the Jungle Chefs?
altHero: dramatic lighting of a crocodile chef contestant, surrounded by spotlights and smoke
alt2: crocodile chef pouring sauces into a bowl
alt3: ant chef next to some hot sauce
alt4: host Mockingbird Mike flying next to the cooking time clock
